release_notes:
🚀 New Update (1.2.8)

- 🌅 Intelligent Fajr-Based Day Reset: Your daily streaks now reset at Fajr time instead of midnight, aligning perfectly with the Islamic day.
- 🔔 Comprehensive Notification Revival: Fixed silent failures and permission issues for Azkar and Adhan reminders.
- ✉️ In-App Feedback: You can now easily send feedback to the developer directly from the Settings screen.
- 🛡️ Preserved Streaks: Upgraded the data migration system to protect your existing progress during this update.
